sample_posts.text: https://x.com/jerryhuang01/status/2074552435436335537

tweet.text:
Everyone in the Bay is building a robot company. Almost nobody is talking about the real bottleneck.

After 2 years running the Robotics Center of Silicon Valley, seeing hundreds of frontier labs and stealth startups, one pattern is undeniable:
The blocker isn't model capability. It’s the sim-to-real loop. 

1. Simulation ≠ Hardware Reality A VLA trained in Isaac Sim or MuJoCo hits a wall when it encounters real-world actuator limits: thermal throttling, joint backlash, and sensor drift. Even two units of the exact same robot model have completely different dynamics.
2. Teleop data is inherent

sample_posts.text: https://x.com/BessemerVP/status/2072724152096903182

tweet.text:
1/ Defense tech has advanced more in the past twenty-four months than in the previous three decades.

We’ve identified five frontiers driving innovation in defense and national security.

1️⃣Autonomy moving from concept to combat
2️⃣AI permeating DoW workflows
3️⃣New vectors for advanced manufacturing
4️⃣Edge and network resilience
5️⃣Energy and materials independence.  🧵

sample_posts.text:
Plan A
> To prevent AI-driven extinction or irreversible concentration of power, we should delay superintelligence development until 2040 and make AI research public.
> Plan A envisions a global AI ecosystem with dozens of competing companies and a balance of power through mutually assured compute destruction.
Source:
https://ai-2040.com/

OpenAI launches the GPT-5.6 family - Sol, Terra, and Luna
The flagship Sol sets new records in intelligence and efficiency while introducing ultra mode for multi-agent coordination and improved computer use
https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-6/

Plan A
To prevent an uncontrolled AI race leading to extinction or absolute dictatorship, humanity should establish an international oversight regime
Including total research transparency and compute caps to freeze superintelligence development until 2040 so power can be distributed safely and democratically
https://ai-2040.com/
